title: Lab 27: At Job Scheduling
description: Schedule a one time task with at and verify that the at daemon is enabled

tasks: Create the user atuser27 and set its password to redhat.
Enable and start the atd service.
As user atuser27, schedule a one-time at job that appends the text AT27 OK to /home/atuser27/at27.log two minutes from now.
hints: You can submit the job to at with standard input.
Use atq to verify that the job is queued.
solution_commands: runuser -l atuser27 -c "echo 'echo AT27 OK >> /home/atuser27/at27.log' | at now + 2 minutes"
